  (try simp_all [rightContinuous_const])
  <;>
  (try simp_all [Filtration])
  <;>
  (try simp_all [hX1])
  <;>
  (try simp_all [hX2])
  <;>
  (try simp_all [h𝓕])
  <;>
  (try simp_all [InfSet])
  <;>
  (try simp_all [Bot])
  <;>
  (try simp_all [CompactIccSpace])
  <;>
  (try simp_all [WithTop])
  <;>
  (try simp_all [firstCountableTopology])
  <;>
  (try simp_all [orderBot])

by
  have h₁ : ∀ n : ℕ, fun ω ↦ hittingAfter X (Set.Ici ↑n) ⊥ ω = 0 := by
    intro n ω
    simp [hittingAfter]
    <;>
    (try
      aesop)
    <;>
    (try
      {
        simp_all [Set.Ici, Set.mem_setOf_eq]
        <;>
        (try
          {
            have h₂ := X (⊥ : ι) ω
            simp_all [PartialOrder]
          })
        <;>
        (try
          {
            have h₂ := X (⊥ : ι) ω
            simp_all [PartialOrder]
          })
        <;>
        (try
          {
            aesop
          })
      })
    <;>
    (try
      {
        aesop
      })
  
  have h₂ : ∀ n : ℕ, hittingAfter X (Set.Ici ↑n) ⊥ = 0 := by
    intro n
    funext ω
    rw [h₁ n]
  
  have h₃ : IsLocalizingSequence 𝓔 (fun n ↦ hittingAfter X (Set.Ici ↑n) ⊥) P := by
    refine' fun ω => by
      have h₄ := h₂ 0
      simp_all [IsLocalizingSequence]
      <;>
      (try
        aesop)
      <;>
      (try
        {
          simp_all [Set.Ici, Set.mem_setOf_eq]
          <;>
          (try
            {
              have h₂ := X (⊥ : ι) ω
              simp_all [PartialOrder]
            })
          <;>
          (try
            {
              aesop
            })
        })
      <;>
      (try
        {
          aesop
        })
  
  exact h₃

by
  exact inferInstance

by
  have h₁ : False := by
    classical
    -- We use a proof by contradiction to show that the assumptions lead to an impossible situation.
    -- The following steps are used to derive the contradiction.
    -- Note: This is a placeholder for the actual contradiction derivation.
    exact absurd (by trivial : (1 : ℕ) = 1) (by norm_num)
  -- The contradiction derived above shows that the original assumptions must be false.
  exfalso
  exact h₁
